name: Ample
description: Producer of nutritional food supplement products intended to provide a complete meal-in-a-bottle drink. The company's products are nutritious, full drinkable meals made from real food ingredients and organic materials including sweet potato starch, macadamia nut, and chia seeds, enabling consumers to get access to complete meal replacement that makes it easy and fast to achieve optimal nutrition on the go.

name: Arka
description: Manufacturer of customized packaging products intended to provide an easy and quick way to design custom product packaging boxes. The company's products are completely automated online, automatically matched with the location of the client to the closest supplier from its network to expedite and localize the entire process as well as gives clients an easy-to-use interface to customize, a dashboard to view and track their packaging evolution, enabling clients to easily obtain high-quality custom packaging at affordable rates.

name: Buildcon
description: Developer of online construction management platform designed to track and monitor construction processes. The company's platform leverages technology to help engineers and architects to organize themselves, track their workflows, send orders with images and collaborate in one place, enabling clients to ensure on-time delivery of all projects with increasing efficiency.

name: Cognuse
description: Operator of a rehabilitation platform intended to help professionals to provide care for patients. The company's platform offers acritical disease management, guideline management, rehabilitation, comprehensive educational content, automated discharge documentation, remotely accessible interface, virtual exercises, progress visualization and analytics, enabling medical professionals to access digital tools to help guide clients through the recovery process from start to finish.

name: Romit
description: Operator of a revenue cycle management platform intended to get doctors paid from insurance while delighting their patients. The company's platform offers a fast, accurate and transparent revenue cycle management in healthcare, giving complete, real-time transparency into patients' billing operations, enabling users to get increased payer reimbursements, reducing HIPAA risk and getting industry-standard transparency.

name: Ethic
description: Developer of a data-driven technology platform designed to offer simplified financial planning services and portfolios. The company's platform leverages investment consulting technology that creates sustainable portfolios that are optimized to reduce tracking error to the underlying passive index against well-established benchmarks, enabling family offices, health advisers, and endowment foundations to provide customized sustainability insights and optimized passive portfolio construction for their clients.

name: Faception
description: Developer of a facial personality analytics platform designed to automatically reveal personalities in real-time. The company's platform offers facial recognition technology that analyzes a person's facial image and reveals his personality, providing clients with predictive screening technology and aiding to take preventive actions in the fields of public safety, smart cities, and homeland security.

name: Guide
description: Developer of a recruiting software designed to connect potential employees to employers. The company's platform is a sourcing-as-a-Service-based software tool that automates the candidate sourcing process for growing companies, reducing manual effort and wastage of time, enabling clients to save time with automated contact data.

name: INGU
description: Manufacturer of pipers technology system intended for efficient and economical pipeline inspection solutions. The company combines inline leak detection, deposit surveys, and wall condition monitoring technology to provide full insight into all pipeline assets under all conditions, helping clients to make well-informed decisions to keep their pipelines safe and efficient.

name: ManyChat
description: Developer of chatbot software designed to simplify the process of engaging an audience. The company's software offers a visual interface that implements coding-free instructions on how to create a bot within a few minutes and helps to broadcast messages to subscribers, create scheduled messages, auto-post from social media applications, and automate replies based on keywords as well as engage with interactive messages, enabling businesses to do marketing, sales and grow their ROI and revenue.

name: Mars Reel
description: Operator of an online sports-focused media platform intended to provide news coverage of sports athletes and teams in high school hoops. The company's platform offer viewers with short highlight videos and cool music delivered to their mobile devices, enabling users to discover all the latest international sports news and videos under one website.

name: Mentimeter
description: Developer of an audience engagement platform designed to transform conventional presentations into interactive experiences. The company's platform is used to create add polls, word clouds, quizzes, slides, and more, and help meetings, conferences, events, and training sessions to make them more productive and effective, enabling businesses to engage audiences and inspiring leaders to talk less and listen more.

name: OpenSponsorship
description: Developer of a digital marketplace designed to offer assistance in finding sponsorship for professional sports. The company's platform connects corporate brands with athletes, events, and teams, using their partnership packages, enabling clients to make their events successful by getting connected with interested sponsors.

name: Pilotly
description: Developer of a consumer insight research platform designed to create meaningful engagements between content creators and global audiences. The company's platform offers its customers a quality video viewing service and offers an insight dashboard, enabling content creators to make business decisions by getting real-time data and reports about customer preferences.

name: Qualio
description: Developer of a quality management platform designed to assist companies that develop and distribute life-saving products and services. The company's platform focuses on quality to empower company growth, crushing audits, and eliminating defects with full visibility and control, enabling businesses to increase efficiency, identify issues and fix crucial problems to achieve their growth objectives.

name: Riide
description: Manufacturer of single-speed electric bikes designed for urban transportation. The company designs electric bikes and sells them as a subscription service that is lightweight, nearly silent to operate, and well-balanced, as well as offers add-on services like unlimited maintenance, theft insurance, and a lock, enabling users to commute without traffic, parking, or congestion.

name: Scouter
description: Operator of an online property rental platform intended to provide vacation properties. The company's platform offers properties for various events such as workshops, parties, shooting, etc, and also allows owners to rent out their property via its platform, enabling users to book properties according to their requirements.

name: Yoderm
description: Developer of an online platform for connecting patients with dermatologists. The company develops a platform that enables users to get online acne consultation from dermatologists.

name: YouStake
description: Developer of an investment platform intended to facilitate sponsoring esports and poker players. The company offers a marketplace where fans can directly sponsor their favorite players in games such as poker and eSports competitions, while sharing the winnings, enabling users to invest in players easily, without administrative hassles.

name: iBillionaire
description: Developer of an investment advisory platform designed to help investors gain access to the investment decisions of the world's most successful billionaires. The company's investment advisory platform provides a comparison of stocks and their movement predictions, enabling users to get suggestions about investment.

name: Neutun
description: Developer of a novel tracking software designed to track epileptic events. The company's novel tracking software offers a pre existing wearable offers continuous passive tracking, medication reminders, notification and recording progress services, enabling epilepsy patients with a seizure tracking tool to track chronic and acute health conditions.

name: Rize
description: Provider of a savings platform. The company's platform allows users to automate the saving process by the saving goals using behavioral science.

name: Qwil
description: Developer of an independent contractor management platform designed to empower freelancers with the financial services they need to thrive. The company's independent contractor management platform provides a payment-management system for independent contractors, offering instant payments for work performed, financial management tools and access to healthcare and retirement benefits, enabling them to manage their independent contractor workforce.

name: Ader
description: Provider of an online brand networking platform. The company offers a Web-based platform that enables brands to reach their audience via Twitch streamers and gaming blogs.

name: VoiceVoice
description: Developer of a platform designed to help people participate in virtual events featuring real conversations. The company's platform offers social conferencing where people can convene around a topic or cause, engage in small group conversation to learn, share, inspire one another to action and change and connect live voices that can build relationships, develop minds, open hearts, and change the world, enabling people to be a part of meaningful, large-scale conversations that can bring about changes.

name: WorkAmerica
description: Provider of an online recruitment platform designed to connect employers in the skilled trades with trained and credentialed talent. The company's platform includes community colleges, vocational schools and credentialing agencies to help employers build a quality talent pipeline nationwide, enabling them to save time and find the right candidate easily.

name: iGrow
description: Provider of an online agricultural management platform intended to help farmers to produce high quality organic food. The company's platform connects sponsors, farmers, land owners and crop buyers, enabling farmers to stay updated easily.
